label: Simulation farms, digital environments & scenario generation

node.label: Simulation farms, digital environments & scenario generation
node.definition: Simulation infrastructure runs many reproducible environments, scenarios, agents, and sensor models for training, evaluation, and synthetic-data generation.
node.why_it_matters: It supplies the interaction volume and controlled counterfactuals needed by embodied, game, and operational AI.
limitations: Fidelity, scenario coverage, determinism, and compute cost determine whether simulated conclusions transfer.

dependencies.rationale: Simulation farms, digital environments & scenario generation turns Workflow, cluster & job orchestration into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Simulation farms, digital environments & scenario generation turns Distributed systems & networking into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Simulation farms, digital environments & scenario generation turns Multimodal, simulated & streaming data into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Simulation farms, digital environments & scenario generation turns Data augmentation & synthetic-data generation into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
